description.ko: 리샤트 구조의 매혹적인 동심원 패턴과 풍부한 광물 질감을 통해 지구의 지질학적 역사를 보여주는 놀라운 시네마틱 이미지입니다.
description.en: A stunning cinematic capture of Earth's geological history, showcasing the mesmerizing concentric patterns and rich mineral textures of the Richat Structure.

prompt: Ultra-high-resolution satellite photography of the Sahara Desert's Eye of the Sahara, intricate concentric rings of sedimentary rock and exposed quartz, deep rust oranges, golden sands, and pale cerulean shadows, hyper-realistic geological textures, cinematic lighting, 8k resolution, macro topographical detail.
